action.reasoning: Observation: Per-env PPO with 1M steps (iter 8) gave 0% success rate. Training curves show only small episodic rewards (<0.06), no success episodes. Analysis: Sparse rewards + partial observability (7×7 egocentric view) prevent PPO from discovering goal regions. PPO on-policy w/o memory fails on hard navigation tasks. Decision: Switch to DQN (off-policy, more sample‑efficient) with frame‑stacking (4 frames) to provide short‑term history and motion cues. Train 300k steps per env (≈50 min total), submit eval to test improvement. If positive, scale up later.
